Key Coverages of Standard Cover There are four key sections: Section One: Building cover* Depending on your choice of coverage, provides cover for loss or damage to Your Building caused by an Accident or a Named Peril during the Policy Period Section Two: Contents cover** Provides cover for loss or damage to Contents caused by an Accident whilst contained in the Building during the Policy Period Section Three: Worldwide Family Liability (Excluding USA/Canada) Covers against claim from Third Party for property damage or bodily injury caused to them which You and Your Family is/are legally liable. Section Four: Personal Accident Covers You and Your Family against death or permanent disability as a result of an accidental injury. Includes linked panel or specialist resources.

Options Choose among our four offerings: Plan A Sum Insured for accidental death or permanent disablement: $50,000 Medical expenses for accidents: $2,000 Plan B Sum Insured for accidental death or permanent disablement: $100,000 Medical expenses for accidents: $4,000 Plan C Sum Insured for accidental death or permanent disablement: $200,000 Medical expenses for accidents: $6,000 Plan D Sum Insured for accidental death or permanent disablement: $300,000 Medical expenses for accidents: $8,000 Important Notes Here is are some key points to take note: All amounts shown are in Singapore Dollars Benefits under this insurance will be payable only upon death, permanent disablement or injury due to an accident. All those who are insured must be a Singapore citizen, Singapore Permanent Resident or foreigner who is holding a valid employment pass, work permit, dependent pass, student pass or social visit pass and residing in Singapore. plans.plan_overview: Secure your journey, safeguard your vehicle with our comprehensive motor insurance From as low as S$500/Year As a driver, driving a vehicle on the road carries different risks, whether it is damage to your own car or getting a claim from a third-party in an accident. If you have just purchased a new car or bike, you would want to get your vehicle insured as soon as possible. Motor insurance is one of the key essentials, yet often overlooked aspects of owning a motor vehicle in Singapore. There are several types of bike and car insurance plans as well as insurers to select from in Singapore. However, knowing which one suits your needs best is crucial. Most motor vehicle owners typically go for the cheapest car insurance. However, rather than prioritising just cost, being aware of what the policy covers and the variety of coverage available are the ideal ways to purchase the best motor insurance . If you are looking for affordable motor vehicle insurance, India International Insurance is able to provide you with the right solution. With our comprehensive coverage, you are assured of protection and coverage of your motor vehicle, the other party's motor vehicle, and, most importantly, yourself while driving or riding on the road. Our policy also provides you with added coverage over loss from natural disasters and theft.

plans.plan_overview: Planning a dream getaway or business trip? With over 30 years of experience, III offers reliable travel insurance plans to protect you every step of the way. Get peace of mind knowing you're covered, from unexpected delays to medical emergencies. FROM LESS THAN S$ 0.8/DAY Travel insurance, also known as travellers insurance, is the best way to protect yourself from financial loss due to the unexpected. Travelling is an exciting experience, but anything can happen while you're away from home. Moreover, certain countries require proof of sufficient travel insurance as a condition of entry or visa approval. Specific coverage and benefits vary, but most comprehensive travel insurance policies offer benefits including trip cancellation, flight cancellation, baggage delay, loss of baggage, trip interruption, travel accident coverage, medical benefits and emergency medical evacuation, loss of passport and travel documents, kidnap/ransom requests, and many other travel-related events and expenses. A leisure or business trip — wherever your travels take you — we offer coverage to protect your international trips with our globally accepted and affordable travel insurance policies. Don't leave home without knowing where to buy travel insurance in Singapore. You can even purchase travel insurance online for added convenience. Get cheap travel insurance quotes today and travel with peace of mind.

plans.plan_overview: Our Reinsurance Solutions Provide Stability and Confidence in an Ever-Changing Insurance Landscape FROM S$60/MONTH As an experienced facultative inward reinsurer, we are able to work large cases and conduct an in-depth assessment on high sums- assured, primarily with a great focus on property in the ASEAN region, as well as North Asia (South Korea, Taiwan). III accepts offers from insurance companies by facultative placement. We specialize in writing risks for various industries including Petrochemical, Semi-conductor, Power plants, and Telecommunications. With a significant capacity to underwrite risks, coupled with a fast turnaround time owing to our single-office operations, our timely service and prudence in servicing all accounts that we underwrite is the reason we enjoy a great reputation and an impressive portfolio.

Single Trip: If you cancel before your trip, you will get a refund minus S$25 (per insured person). No refund if the trip has already started. Annual Multi-Trip: If you cancel within 30 days before your policy starts, we’ll refund based on short-term rates, as long as no claims have been made.

02/03/2026: Due to the escalating security situation in the Middle East, following strikes by the United States and Israel on Iran commencing on Saturday, 28 February 2026, under the terms of our policy, this situation falls under the General Exclusions relating to war and war-like operations, which apply to all sections of the policy. This means the policy does not cover any claim that arises directly or indirectly from war, hostilities, retaliatory strikes, or military actions.

plans.plan_overview: We all know how important it is to rest and recover when health issues strike. Even when your body needs a break, life and its responsibilities keep moving. Hospitalisation often brings more than just health concerns. It may cause income loss, add unexpected expenses not fully covered by health insurance, and disrupt your financial plans. That’s a lot to handle at a time when you should be focused on getting better. This hospital income plan is designed to provide income support when you can't work, comprehensive 360° care that goes beyond hospitalisation, and coverage without a premium price tag.

Over 2 million Singaporeans and Permanent Residents are currently covered under the Dependants’ Protection Scheme (DPS).
DPS is a term-life insurance scheme administered by Great Eastern Life to cover death, terminal illness 1 and total permanent disability 2 through your CPF. No cash needed 3 .
How do you stay covered under DPS?
You are automatically enrolled when you make a valid CPF working contribution. Policyholder is encouraged to submit the Health Declaration for assessment on eligible coverage.
Get up to 4X the protection with GoGreat Term Life.
Exclusive to DPS members, receive up to S$300,000 additional coverage from just S$0.21 daily!

plan_benefits: Boost your savings at 1.5% p.a.* from day one. No fees, no lock-ins, no nonsense. We promise.
The Singlife Account Is Not Just a Savings Plan. It’s an Insurance Savings Solution.
Singlife Account Key Features and Benefits
Insurance benefits

Note that all crediting rates are not guaranteed. The Singlife Account is an insurance savings plan. It is neither a bank savings account nor a fixed deposit. Each person is only entitled to one Singlife Account.
Your Singlife Account will be in force with an initial premium of S$100. Subsequently, you may use FAST at any time to transfer funds to your personal account(s) via the Singlife App.
The minimum account value is S$100. There will be no returns or benefits with your Singlife Account if this value falls below S$100.

With the Singlife Account, your policy is also safeguarded under the Policy Owners' Protection Scheme , administered by the Singapore Deposit Insurance Corporation (SDIC) – giving you added peace of mind.

plans.plan_overview: Secure your journey, safeguard your vehicle with our comprehensive motor insurance From as low as S$500/Year As a driver, driving a vehicle on the road carries different risks, whether it is damage to your own car or getting a claim from a third-party in an accident. If you have just purchased a new car or bike, you would want to get your vehicle insured as soon as possible. Motor insurance is one of the key essentials, yet often overlooked aspects of owning a motor vehicle in Singapore. There are several types of bike and car insurance plans as well as insurers to select from in Singapore. However, knowing which one suits your needs best is crucial. Most motor vehicle owners typically go for the cheapest car insurance. However, rather than prioritising just cost, being aware of what the policy covers and the variety of coverage available are the ideal ways to purchase the best motor insurance . If you are looking for affordable motor vehicle insurance, India International Insurance is able to provide you with the right solution. With our comprehensive coverage, you are assured of protection and coverage of your motor vehicle, the other party's motor vehicle, and, most importantly, yourself while driving or riding on the road. Our policy also provides you with added coverage over loss from natural disasters and theft.

plans.plan_overview: Planning a dream getaway or business trip? With over 30 years of experience, III offers reliable travel insurance plans to protect you every step of the way. Get peace of mind knowing you're covered, from unexpected delays to medical emergencies. FROM LESS THAN S$ 0.8/DAY Travel insurance, also known as travellers insurance, is the best way to protect yourself from financial loss due to the unexpected. Travelling is an exciting experience, but anything can happen while you're away from home. Moreover, certain countries require proof of sufficient travel insurance as a condition of entry or visa approval. Specific coverage and benefits vary, but most comprehensive travel insurance policies offer benefits including trip cancellation, flight cancellation, baggage delay, loss of baggage, trip interruption, travel accident coverage, medical benefits and emergency medical evacuation, loss of passport and travel documents, kidnap/ransom requests, and many other travel-related events and expenses. A leisure or business trip — wherever your travels take you — we offer coverage to protect your international trips with our globally accepted and affordable travel insurance policies. Don't leave home without knowing where to buy travel insurance in Singapore. You can even purchase travel insurance online for added convenience. Get cheap travel insurance quotes today and travel with peace of mind.

Start Your Protection Early with Raffles Critical Illness Plan

plan_benefits: Boost your savings at 1.5% p.a.* from day one. No fees, no lock-ins, no nonsense. We promise.
The Singlife Account Is Not Just a Savings Plan. It’s an Insurance Savings Solution.
Singlife Account Key Features and Benefits
Insurance benefits

Note that all crediting rates are not guaranteed. The Singlife Account is an insurance savings plan. It is neither a bank savings account nor a fixed deposit. Each person is only entitled to one Singlife Account.
Your Singlife Account will be in force with an initial premium of S$100. Subsequently, you may use FAST at any time to transfer funds to your personal account(s) via the Singlife App.
The minimum account value is S$100. There will be no returns or benefits with your Singlife Account if this value falls below S$100.

With the Singlife Account, your policy is also safeguarded under the Policy Owners' Protection Scheme , administered by the Singapore Deposit Insurance Corporation (SDIC) – giving you added peace of mind.

plans.plan_description: SunBrilliance Indexed Universal Life (IUL) II is a flexible plan that’s indexed to the S&P 500 and designed to give you a good balance of lifetime coverage and high potential growth, with downside protection.
plans.plan_overview: Lifetime coverage To leave a legacy . Dependents receive a death benefit from the policy, as well as any savings or investments. High potential growth Through an Indexed Account linked to the S&P 500 index performance and A guaranteed loyalty bonus (from policy year 11 onwards) to increase your account value every year Downside protection 0% p.a. floor on the Indexed Account Guaranteed 2.50% p.a. crediting rate for the Fixed Account in the first 20 years Guaranteed loyalty bonus credited every year (from policy year 11 onwards)

Section Four: Personal Accident Covers You and Your Family against death or permanent disability as a result of an accidental injury.
